query: Count all buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Kristiansand

2.description: get buildings in the municipality using kommunenummer from step 1

3.description: retrieve 200-year storm-flood polygons clipped to the municipality extent from step 1

4.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced storm-flood polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per building (group by bygningsnummer)
